text: Hell, yeah, dude. Party at Tiffs.
context: Enthusiastic response to team member's personal milestone (closing on a property).

text: Working hard on something you love is how bad of a time could it be, right? Especially if there's a beach involved.
context: Reframing work retreat as opportunity rather than obligation.

text: The insider scoop on Calendly is that they're trying to reorient their business around relationship management.
context: Sharing proprietary industry knowledge to inform partnership strategy.

text: Get it into enough hands so we understand what the core value prop is.
context: Product strategy prioritizing usage volume and discovery over perfection.

text: This is just an opportune thing. This is someone I'd spoken to months ago when we spoke about hackathon has just come back to me saying I want to learn about Zo.
context: Illustrating the value of maintaining network edges that reactivate opportunistically.

text: She's really lovely to meet and chat with as well. Like she'll be a good person to be in your network.
context: Framing business interactions as network-building opportunities for team members.
Reinforcing team member's correct categorization of business information.

text: But they're not CRM. They're... [pause] It's trying to reorient.
